global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a promotional message and product images.
global.main_message: Promoting products with free shipping offer.

elements.label: light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: three product images
elements.description: Three rectangular outlines representing product images, arranged horizontally in the center of the ad.

elements.label: promotional message
elements.description: A bold, black text message stating 'Your next favorite pick' with a smaller line below it saying 'Free shipping over $25'.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo of BoltCart, displayed in a simple and modern font at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A rounded black button with white text saying 'Book now', positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, black letters, located at the top right corner of the ad.
